about.body1: We're a team of designers, strategists, and developers obsessed with crafting digital experiences that move people. Since 2018, we've partnered with forward-thinking brands to turn bold ideas into reality.
about.body2: Every project starts with curiosity. We dig deep into your vision, challenge assumptions, and build solutions that don't just look good—they work harder and smarter.
about.heading: About Northwind
about.label: Our Story
about.point2: Award-winning creative across digital and print
about.point3: Collaborative partnerships that feel like an extension of your team

contact.heading: Let's create something great
contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.subtext: We typically respond within 24 hours. Let's talk about what's next.
contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. We'll be in touch soon.

hero.headline3: We craft bold digital experiences for brands that refuse to blend in.
hero.label: Creative Agency
hero.subtext: Strategy, design, and development for brands with something to say.

work.heading: Selected Work
work.label: Our Projects
work.subtext: A selection of recent projects that showcase our approach to strategy, design, and execution.
